# 👋 Welcome to LiveLens Community!

Thank you for joining the **LiveLens** community! We're excited to have you here.

## 🎬 What is LiveLens?

**LiveLens** is a professional live streaming, recording, scene control, and VTuber tool for Android. It brings OBS-style production capabilities directly to your mobile device.

## 📚 Quick Links

- 🌐 [Official Website](https://www.livelens.live/)
- ✨ [All Features](https://www.livelens.live/pages/feature.html)
- 🎨 [Floating Control Themes](https://www.livelens.live/pages/overlays.html)
- 🎤 [Voice Chat](https://www.livelens.live/voice/voice.html)
- 💬 [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/kUqmbKhs6w)

## 🤝 How to Use Discussions

This is a space for the community to:
- **Ask questions** about features and usage
- **Share ideas** for improvements
- **Report bugs** and issues
- **Showcase** your LiveLens streams and content
- **Connect** with other creators

## 📋 Discussion Categories

Choose the category that best fits your topic:

1. **Questions & Support** - Get help with using LiveLens
2. **Feature Requests** - Suggest new features
3. **Showcase** - Share your streams and creations
4. **General Discussion** - Chat with the community

## 💡 Tips

- Please search before asking - your question might already be answered!
- Be respectful and constructive in all discussions
- Include relevant details when asking for help (device info, version, etc.)
- Check the [FAQ](https://www.livelens.live/pages/contact.html) for common questions

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. Download LiveLens from [livelens.live](https://www.livelens.live/)
2. Check out the features on our [Features Page](https://www.livelens.live/pages/feature.html)
3. Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/kUqmbKhs6w) for real-time chat
4. Start streaming and recording!

---

**Happy streaming!** 🎬✨
